reviews.comment:
Excelente cómo siempre, encima los playeros unos genios totales justo cuando pasé había desabastecimiento y cola de vehículos... Atendían con mucho humor y buena onda. Excelente total

(Translated by Google)
Excellent as always, and the gas station attendants were absolutely fantastic. Just when I was passing by, there was a shortage and a long line of vehicles... They were so funny and friendly. Totally excellent.

reviews.comment:
Hay tres surtidores y siempre expenden solo de 1 ( cuando hay combustible) y en temporada la fila llega a mas de una cuadra.

(Translated by Google)
There are three pumps and they always only dispense 1 (when there is fuel) and in season the line reaches more than a block.
